claims.text: We claim: 1. A 3,3-diphenylpropylamine of formula I ##STR12## wherein R 1 represents hydrogen or methyl, R 2 and R 3 independently represent hydrogen, methyl, methoxy, hydroxy, carbamoyl, sulphamoyl o...

a) reducing the group R 6 CO of a 3,3-diphenylpropylamine of formula III ##STR15## wherein R 1 to R 3 and X are as defined above, R 6 is hydrogen or R 7 O, where R 7 is hydrogen, alkyl, alkenyl, alkyn...
c) reducing a 3,3-diphenylpropionamide of formula VI ##STR17## wherein R 1 to R 3 and X are as defined above and any hydroxy groups may be protected, or

e) reducing a 3,3-diphenylpropenamine of formula VIIIa or a 3,3-diphenylpropylamine of formula VIIIb ##STR19## wherein R 1 to R 3 and X are as defined above and any hydroxy groups may be protected, an...
14. A method for treating acetylcholine-mediated disorders which comprises administering to a patient in need thereof an effective amount of a 3,3-diphenylpropylamine as claimed in claim 1.

use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF PATIENTS WITH AN OVERACTIVE BLADDER WITH SYMPTOMS OF URINARY FREQUENCY, URGENCY, OR URGE INCONTINENCE

indications.text:
DETROL Tablets are indicated for the treatment of overactive bladder with symptoms
of urge urinary incontinence, urgency, and frequency.
